name: Sukhariki - Hazelnut Rusks
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat the eggs and sugar until light and fluffy.
2. Mix the nuts and flour together, then mix into the egg mixture.
3. Grease an 8-inch loaf pan. Pour in batter and bake at 300°F for 50 minutes.
4. Turn the loaf out of the pan, wrap in a moist dish towel, and let stand for 4 hours.
5. Cut into 1/3 inch slices. Place on a cookie sheet and bake at 250°F until lightly browned and crisp, about 3 hours.
6. Makes 2 dozen.
From "A Taste of Russia".
